nasb.text: We will not conceal them from their children, But tell to the generation to come the praises of the Lord, And His strength and His wondrous works that He has done.

esv.text: We will not hide them from their children, but tell to the coming generation the glorious deeds of the Lord, and his might, and the wonders that he has done.

cnv.text: 我們不把這些事向他們的子孫隱瞞， 卻要把耶和華應得的讚美、他的能力， 和他所行的奇事， 都向後代的人述說。

ccb.text: 我们不要在子孙面前隐瞒事实， 要把耶和华当受称颂的作为、 祂的权能和所行的奇事告诉下一代。

csbs.text: 我们不会向子孙隐瞒， 而要向后代讲述对耶和华的赞美， 讲述他的大能和他所行的奇妙作为。
